assertions: Reads actual submodule commit via git submodule status or GitHub API
Reads SkMilestone.h from actual submodule to get real Skia milestone
Identifies upstream google/skia merge commit from git history
Reads DEPS file from actual submodule commit
Verifies at least 3 third-party dep versions from headers/mirrors
Classifies Skia CVEs using verified milestone from SkMilestone.h
Searches CVEs for all security-relevant dependencies
Searches mono/SkiaSharp issues for security reports
Report includes Summary table with status counts
Report uses separate tables per dependency
Skia CVEs table shows Fix milestone and Severity
Correctly classifies affected vs fixed Skia CVEs
